paper-cream.$description: Paper Cream — Page background — warm off-white canvas, the surface everything floats on

bone-white.$description: Bone White — Alternate surface for image plates and card containers layered on the cream canvas

ink-charcoal.$description: Ink Charcoal — Primary text, heading fills, and structural borders — near-black with a faint warm cast that sits softer on cream than pure black

pure-ink.$description: Pure Ink — Navigation text, link colors, and heading strokes — reserved for the most weighty typographic moments

editorial-serif-display-likely-bodonidid.$value: Editorial Serif (display — likely Bodoni/Didone family or custom)
editorial-serif-display-likely-bodonidid.$description: Hero nameplate only — the massive 'Cori Corinne' cover line. High-contrast strokes (hairline serifs, thick verticals) create a fashion-magazine authority. Not used anywhere else on the site; this is a one-shot signature moment.

neue-haas-grotesk-text.$description: Navigation and body text — the workhorse sans. Tight line-height (1.0) at large sizes for nav, generous (2.33) for body. Its restraint and neutrality are the point: the serif gets all the drama.

open-sans.$description: Secondary body and link text — slightly warmer geometry than Neue Haas, used as a fallback or accent voice for long-form reading sections.

paper-canvas.$description: Surface level 1: Base page background — warm cream, the dominant surface

plate-white.$description: Surface level 2: Image plate backgrounds and card containers that sit on the cream
